name: Scalloped Turkey & Cauliflower
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Whole wheat or all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook cauliflower in boiling, salted water for 6 minutes or until almost tender. Drain.
2. In a small saucepan, combine turkey stock, flour and seasonings. Cook and stir until the mixture is slightly thickened.
3. Place turkey breast in a greased baking pan. Arrange cauliflower around the turkey breast. Pour the sauce over the turkey and cauliflower.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until heated through.
4 servings, each 112 calories; 1 medium-fat meat; 1 vegetable exchange
Source: Diabetic High Fiber Cookbook by Mary Jane Finsand (c. 1985)
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Oct 93
